info.name: Data publishing
info.summary: Publish files and folders to research data repositories with a citable DOI
info.description: Publish research outputs from Nextcloud to external repositories — Zenodo and Figshare — making them findable and giving them a citable DOI. A pluggable target-adapter design lets further destinations (Dataverse, a media platform, notebook hosting) be added without touching the core. Authors are prefilled from the user's connected ORCID iD.
info.author: Frederik Orellana, DTU
Lars Næsbye Christensen, DeIC (original ownCloud app)
